GREMLINS-FRAGMENTATION_GRENADE.title: Fragmentation Grenade
GREMLINS-FRAGMENTATION_GRENADE.descripti: Damage dealt to random enemies is increased by 3.
GREMLINS-FRAGMENTATION_GRENADE.flavor: Nobody dares to ask where the Gremlin got it from.
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_BOMB.title: Gremlin Bomb
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_BOMB.description: Whenever a Gremlin dies, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_BOMB.flavor: Gremlins have an uncanny knack for finding dangerous things. Sometimes, they even survive looting them.
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_GRAVESTONE.title: Gremlin Gravestone
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_GRAVESTONE.description: Dead Gremlins can be Resurrected at Rest Sites as a Free Action.
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_GRAVESTONE.flavor: Where do gremlins go when they die? Not bloody far enough.
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_LEADERS_VOUCHER.title: Gremlin Leader's Voucher
GREMLINS-GREMLIN_LEADERS_VOUCHER.descrip:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn.
Upon pickup, permanently lose a Gremlin.
GREMLINS-IMPECCABLE_PECS.title: Impeccable Pecs
GREMLINS-IMPECCABLE_PECS.description:
Whenever you gain [gold]Strength[/gold], gain an equal amount of [gold]Temporary HP[/gold].
Start each combat with 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
GREMLINS-MAGIC_MALLET.title: Magic Mallet
GREMLINS-MAGIC_MALLET.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Weak[/gold], gain [blue]{WizPower}[/blue] [gold]Wiz[/gold], up to 3 times per turn.
GREMLINS-MOB_LEADERS_CROWN.title: Mob Leader's Crown
GREMLINS-MOB_LEADERS_CROWN.description: The first time you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card, and [gold]Swap[/gold] to the next Gremlin.
GREMLINS-MOB_LEADERS_CROWN.flavor: The fancier the symbol of office, the more likely it is to be stolen.
GREMLINS-MOB_LEADERS_STAFF.title: Mob Leader's Staff
GREMLINS-MOB_LEADERS_STAFF.description: At the start of each combat, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}, and [gold]Swap[/gold] to the next Gremlin.
GREMLINS-MOB_LEADERS_STAFF.flavor: Among gremlin mobs, the one with the best horn maintains complete command over the troupe, until another one manages to steal it.
GREMLINS-SHORT_STATUE.title: Short Statue
GREMLINS-SHORT_STATUE.description: The first time a Gremlin would die each combat, heal it to 75% of your Max HP instead.
GREMLINS-SHORT_STATUE.flavor: It is surprising how well it works.
GREMLINS-STOLEN_MERCHANDISE.title: Stolen MercHandise
GREMLINS-STOLEN_MERCHANDISE.description: Whenever you Swap, gain an Echo of a random Colorless card. At the start of combat, the Merchant gains 2 Strength.
GREMLINS-TAG_TEAMWORK.title: Tag Teamwork
GREMLINS-TAG_TEAMWORK.description:
Whenever you draw [gold]Tag Team[/gold], draw another card.
Upon pickup, add two copies of [gold]Tag Team[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
GREMLINS-WIZARD_HAT.title: Wizard Hat
GREMLINS-WIZARD_HAT.description: Whenever you consume [gold]Wiz[/gold], remove a debuff at random.
GREMLINS-WIZARD_HAT.flavor: The accompanying robes have long since been stolen.
GREMLINS-WIZARD_STAFF.title: Wizard Staff
GREMLINS-WIZARD_STAFF.flavor: The pride and joy of every Gremlin Wizard, this staff is a frequent target of theft by rival mobs.
GREMLINS-WOUND_POKER.title: Wound Poker
GREMLINS-WOUND_POKER.description: At the end of each turn, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to each [gold]Weakened[/gold] enemy.
GREMLINS-WOUND_POKER.flavor: Does it hurt when I do this?
